Built on Solid Ground

Total Concrete Services, INC started with a simple mission: to provide reliable, high-quality concrete work to the Bakersfield community. Founded by lifelong Kern County residents, we understand the unique challenges our climate and soil present.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our concrete contractor services.

How long does it take to pour a concrete foundation?

The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project. Generally, it takes 1-3 days for smaller residential foundations and longer for larger commercial structures. We'll provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

What type of concrete mix do you use for foundations?

We use high-strength concrete mixes specifically designed for foundation applications. These mixes are resistant to cracking and provide superior load-bearing capacity. We adjust the mix based on the specific soil conditions and project requirements.

Do you offer foundation repair services?

Yes, we offer comprehensive foundation repair services, including crack repair, leveling, and underpinning. We'll assess the damage and recommend the most effective solution to restore the structural integrity of your foundation.

Reviews From Our Concrete Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Total Concrete Services did an amazing job on our new driveway! They were professional, efficient, and the quality of the work is outstanding. Our old asphalt driveway was cracked and crumbling, and they completely transformed our curb appeal. Highly recommend!"

Maria G. Concrete Driveway

"We hired Total Concrete to pour a slab for our new shed. They showed up on time, prepped the area well, and the slab is perfectly level. There was a small delay due to weather, but they communicated clearly throughout the process. Would use them again."

David S. Concrete Slab

"Our new stamped concrete patio is absolutely beautiful! The crew at Total Concrete Services helped us choose the perfect pattern and color to match our backyard. The attention to detail was impressive, and they cleaned up everything thoroughly when they were finished. We love spending time on our new patio!"

Jessica K. Stamped Concrete Patio
